# Rise with Remya — llms.txt

> Rise with Remya is the official platform of Remya Krishnakripa, a certified Akashic Record Reader and Energy Healer based in India. The website offers a comprehensive range of spiritual healing and personal transformation services designed to help individuals break deep-rooted emotional, karmic, and subconscious patterns that affect their relationships, career, finances, health, and overall well-being.

## About the Practitioner

Remya Krishnakripa is a certified Akashic Record Reader, energy healer, author, and transformational coach. She works with individuals across the globe through online and in-person sessions, helping them understand and heal the root causes of their life challenges — whether emotional, relational, financial, or spiritual. Her approach integrates multiple healing modalities including Akashic Records, Inner Child Healing, Past Life Healing, Angel Healing, Chakra Healing, and more.

## Services Offered

### Akashic Record Reading
A soul-level reading that accesses your Akashic Records — the energetic archive of your soul's journey. This session helps uncover recurring patterns, karmic imprints, and root causes of challenges in career, relationships, health, and life direction. It provides deep clarity and guidance for aligned decision-making.
- URL: https://remyakrishnakripa.com/akashic-record-reading

### Past Life Healing & Release
A healing process that identifies and resolves unresolved past life patterns affecting the present. This includes emotional release, closure, and energetic clearing of fears, phobias, repeating relationship dynamics, and unexplained blocks that originate from previous lifetimes.
- URL: https://remyakrishnakripa.com/past-life-regression

### Inner Child Healing
A transformative session focused on healing the emotional imprints formed during childhood, teenage years, and early adulthood. It addresses deep-seated patterns of self-doubt, people-pleasing, fear of rejection, emotional sensitivity, and difficulty setting boundaries.
- URL: https://remyakrishnakripa.com/inner-child-healing

### Career & Wealth Alignment
A session designed to help individuals understand why their external career and financial growth does not match their potential. It identifies internal blocks — rooted in self-worth, fear, and subconscious patterns — and aligns career and wealth with the individual's true capabilities.
- URL: https://remyakrishnakripa.com/career-wealth-alignment

### Angel Healing Therapy
A high-frequency energy healing process that works with angelic energies to support holistic transformation across relationships, physical well-being, emotional balance, abundance, and spiritual growth. It addresses energetic and karmic blocks at a deeper level.
- URL: https://remyakrishnakripa.com/angel-healing-therapy

### Space Clearance
The process of clearing and resetting the energy of a home, office, or physical environment. This service removes stagnant emotional and energetic imprints from spaces, restoring balance, harmony, and flow — especially impactful for career, business, and relationship environments.
- URL: https://remyakrishnakripa.com/space-clearance

### Chakra Healing & Alignment
A session focused on restoring balance to the body's energy centres (chakras). It clears blockages and imbalances that manifest as anxiety, confidence issues, communication difficulties, relationship struggles, and lack of clarity or grounding.
- URL: https://remyakrishnakripa.com/chakra-healing-alignment

### Relationship Healing
A deep healing session that uncovers the soul-level patterns, karmic connections, and emotional wounds driving relationship challenges. It addresses repeating dynamics, attachment, confusion, and pain — empowering the individual to heal and make aligned decisions.
- URL: https://remyakrishnakripa.com/relationship-healing

### Deep Pattern Release & Integrated Healing
A multi-layered healing journey that targets the root cause of recurring life patterns across all areas — career, money, relationships, and emotional well-being. It integrates Akashic insight, inner child healing, energy healing, and emotional release for deep, lasting transformation.
- URL: https://remyakrishnakripa.com/deep-pattern-release

### Confident Communication
A program designed to break free from communication blocks rooted in inner child wounds. It helps individuals speak their truth with confidence, set boundaries, and express themselves authentically in all relationships.
- URL: https://remyakrishnakripa.com/confident-communication

### Career Accelerator Mentorship
A mentorship program that addresses the 14 inner child patterns that block professional success. It transforms career trajectories through soul-aligned coaching, helping individuals step into leadership with confidence and clarity.
- URL: https://remyakrishnakripa.com/career-accelerator

### Become an Energy Healer
A training and certification pathway for individuals who feel called to learn energy healing methods and become practitioners themselves. It covers the foundational and advanced techniques used in Remya's healing practice.
- URL: https://remyakrishnakripa.com/become-a-healer
